hypothesis: Replacing the 2D CATS pharmacophore reward with a conformer-ensemble 3D pharmacophore overlap metric during RL training will generate ERα antagonist candidates with mean QVina docking energies at least 1.0 kcal/mol more favorable and median in vitro ERα IC50 values at least twofold lower than those produced by the CATS-based framework, while preserving ≥95% database novelty.
